programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of a crazy old Scottish miner who has lived in isolation for many decades. Action adventure, directed by and starring Charlton Heston, with Kim Basinger and Nick Mancuso

programme.title: Gaiety George (1948)
programme.desc: An Irish music hall impresario comes to London to seek his fortune, and makes it big by buying a rundown theatre and transforming it into a major attraction. Drama based on the life of Biopic of impresario George Edwardes, starring Richard Greene, Ann Todd, Hazel Court, Charles Victor and Peter Graves

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.desc: Two struggling musicians plan to sell their precious collection of vinyl records to fund a road trip to Memphis. They resort to stealing an extremely rare black metal album, and begin to suspect a curse has been placed on the record as a run of disastrous fortune befalls them. Drama, starring Edward Hayter and Aki Omoshaybi

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists arrive in Rome and embark on a busy day of sightseeing, although some of the trippers grow tired of what they regard as Sally's constant attention-seeking

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists reach Florence, but their appreciation of the Renaissance splendour is disrupted as Pasquale has difficulties with the laundry and Brendan is embarrassed by his travelling companions during a lesson at an art school. Returning to the coach, the passengers are shocked to learn they face a special vote

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Morale hits a new low following the previous day's poll as the coach arrives in Pisa. The tourists take snaps of the famous leaning tower and visit a cheese factory in Parma before decision time causes tempers to flare once again

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: Seven Thunders (1957)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers escape from German prison camps and hide out in a fishing village in occupied France. As they wait for the opportunity to return to England, they attract the attention of a doctor who is also a serial killer preying on fugitives from the Nazis. Second World War drama based on Rupert Croft-Cooke's novel, starring Stephen Boyd and James Robertson Justice

programme.title: The Coronation of Queen Elizabeth II
programme.desc: Documentary charting the historic events of June 2, 1953, when the Queen became the 39th sovereign to be crowned at Westminster Abbey. What happened behind the scenes is explored through diaries, letters and government papers, as well as rare film footage and photographs, and there are also interviews with historians and experts on royal ceremonies. The programme reveals that Her Majesty's apparent calmness during the Coronation contrasted with organisers' last-minute nerves as the BBC mounted its most ambitious television broadcast to date, amid the concerns of prime minister Winston Churchill

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary examines the key role played by royalty in smoothing the path to the Anglo-Russian entente of 1907, and the part played by the Kaiser's erratic, unstable personality in the growing isolation of Germany in the years leading up to 1914. The film also explores the roles played by the German, British and Russian monarchs in the months leading up to the outbreak of the First World War and tells the story of George V's refusal to grant his cousin Nicholas II asylum in England following the Russian Revolution of 1917

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: UCMMA
programme.desc: Some of the UK's finest Mixed Martial Arts fighters tear it up in the cage with intense action from East London's iconic venue, The Troxy

programme.desc: Military drama following life for a group of SAS recruits, starring Ross Kemp
